blocks.text: Hovland at Bay Hill: The Signature Event Norway Has Been Waiting For

Viktor Hovland tees off at one of golf's most prestigious Signature Events while Kristoffer Ventura plays concurrently at the Puerto Rico Open. Then, late Thursday night, Formula 1 fires up its 2025 season in Melbourne.
⛳ Arnold Palmer Invitational — Hovland chases Bay Hill glory at a marquee Signature Event
⚽ Crystal Palace at Tottenham Hotspur — mid-table Premier League encounter, low title implications
🏎️ Australian Grand Prix — F1 season opener in Melbourne, first championship points up for grabs
